creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hooks are a non-starter at this point as I have no time for it. 

Are you talking about port build log files (from the -H option)? 
If so, I could see the value in keeping them, but I'm not sure 
that adding a lot of complexity to that process is useful. 

Perhaps you could post your script (or send it to me privately) 
so I have a better idea what you're asking for? 

Thanks, 

Doug
